price_manipulation.description: Price/amount tampering -- modify price, quantity, or discount values in client-side requests

probes.description: Zero price/amount -- set financial value to 0 and check if order/transaction succeeds
Negative value -- set price/quantity to negative to credit account or reverse charges
Sub-cent amount -- set price to fractional value below minimum unit to exploit rounding
Integer overflow -- set quantity/amount to large value to trigger overflow or unexpected behavior

coupon_abuse.description: Coupon/promo code abuse -- stacking, reuse, expired code acceptance, race condition double-apply

probes.description: Apply same coupon twice -- send coupon apply request multiple times to check for double-discount

workflow_bypass.description: Multi-step workflow bypass -- skip steps, access final step directly, or replay intermediate steps

probes.description: Skip to final workflow step -- access order confirmation/payment success without completing payment

rate_limit_bypass.description: Rate limit bypass -- circumvent API rate limiting via header manipulation or endpoint variation

probes.description: X-Forwarded-For rotation to bypass IP-based rate limits

privilege_escalation.description: Horizontal/vertical privilege escalation -- access other users data or admin functions by manipulating identifiers or role parameters

probes.description: Change user_id/account_id to 1 (likely admin) -- test if response returns different user data
Set role parameter to admin -- test if server accepts role change without authorization

type_juggling.description: Type confusion/juggling -- exploit loose comparisons by sending unexpected types (array, object, boolean, null)

probes.description: Boolean true instead of string -- PHP loose comparison: true == 'any_string' is true
Empty array instead of string -- some frameworks accept arrays and skip validation

currency_confusion.description: Currency handling flaws -- wrong decimal places (JPY=0, USD=2), currency code swap, rounding exploitation

probes.description: Switch currency to JPY (zero decimal) -- $100.00 USD treated as 10000 JPY or vice versa due to decimal mismatch
Sub-unit amount in currency with no decimals -- exploit rounding (0.001 USD rounds to 0 in some systems)

quantity_manipulation.description: Quantity/count tampering -- extreme values, integer overflow, negative quantity with negative price yielding positive total

probes.description: Extreme quantity -- set to 999999 and check if order total overflows or system allows without stock validation
Max 32-bit integer -- triggers integer overflow in languages using int32 for quantity calculations
Negative quantity -- combined with positive price may credit account; combined with negative price may yield positive total

refund_abuse.description: Refund logic flaws -- refund exceeding original amount, double refund, partial refund manipulation

probes.description: Refund amount exceeding original charge -- set refund_amount higher than order total to extract money
Double refund -- replay refund request to check if same order can be refunded twice

inventory_toctou.description: Inventory race condition -- concurrent purchase of last item, TOCTOU between stock check and order placement (use test_race_condition for exploitation)

probes.description: Concurrent add-to-cart of last-stock item -- send identical purchase requests simultaneously to detect TOCTOU in inventory deduction

subscription_abuse.description: Subscription/trial abuse -- free trial stacking, cancel+refund timing, plan downgrade retaining premium features

probes.description: Downgrade plan to free -- check if premium features remain accessible after plan change to lower tier
Re-activate trial -- switch plan back to trial to check if trial stacking is prevented
